example: 5S is a lean methodology aimed at transforming messy workplaces.
5S begins with the sort step to eliminate unneeded tools.
The goal is to create a standardized way to store and retrieve tools.
The shine step keeps the workplace clean and equipment in good shape.
Standardize ensures the principles of 5S are performed daily.
Sustain involves incorporating 5S into your daily routine.
Red tags help identify objects that need to be removed.
zh: 紅標籤，用於標示需移除物品

example: Sort step creates a space free of clutter.
A logical workflow is free from distraction.
Floor marking can improve organization and safety.
Industrial floor tapes are preferred to painted lines.
Daily shine practice should include inspection and maintenance.
Inspecting tools for damage is part of maintenance.
Make 5S a part of the daily routine.
Safety plays a critical role in every company.
A rotating committee can help with 5S engagement.
5S increases morale among employees.
5S leads to increased productivity.
Shine step reduces equipment breakdowns.
Labels and signs contribute to a safe visual workplace.
